title: Raw Event
description: Audit-like event envelope generated by Go ingestor after receiving an input event.

event_id.description: Unique identifier used to link this raw event with downstream findings.

received_at.description: UTC timestamp when the Go ingestor received the event.

schema_version.description: Version of the raw event envelope schema.

raw_payload.description: Original event payload body. Kept flexible in MVP.

payload_hash.description: Integrity hash of raw_payload (expected format: sha256:<64 hex chars>).
